inputs.label: Flow Rate
inputs.businessContext: Volumetric flow rate of the fluid. Typical range for industrial pumps: 0.001 to 1 m³/s.

businessContext_i18n.en: Volumetric flow rate of the fluid. Typical range for industrial pumps: 0.001 to 1 m³/s.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Akışkanın hacimsel debisi. Endüstriyel pompalar için tipik aralık: 0.001 - 1 m³/s.
businessContext_i18n.de: Volumetrischer Durchfluss des Fluids. Typischer Bereich für Industriepumpen: 0,001 bis 1 m³/s.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Débit volumétrique du fluide. Plage typique pour pompes industrielles : 0,001 à 1 m³/s.
businessContext_i18n.es: Caudal volumétrico del fluido. Rango típico para bombas industriales: 0.001 a 1 m³/s.

inputs.label: Total Head
inputs.businessContext: Total dynamic head (TDH) that the pump must overcome, including static lift and friction losses.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total dynamic head (TDH) that the pump must overcome, including static lift and friction losses.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pompanın aşması gereken toplam dinamik yük (TDH), statik kaldırma ve sürtünme kayıplarını içerir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtförderhöhe (TDH), die die Pumpe überwinden muss, einschließlich statischer Förderhöhe und Reibungsverluste.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur manométrique totale (HMT) que la pompe doit surmonter, incluant la hauteur statique et les pertes par frottement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura dinámica total (TDH) que la bomba debe superar, incluyendo la elevación estática y las pérdidas por fricción.

inputs.label: Fluid Density
inputs.businessContext: Density of the pumped fluid. Water: 1000 kg/m³, oil: ~900 kg/m³, chemicals vary.

businessContext_i18n.en: Density of the pumped fluid. Water: 1000 kg/m³, oil: ~900 kg/m³, chemicals vary.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pompalanan akışkanın yoğunluğu. Su: 1000 kg/m³, yağ: ~900 kg/m³, kimyasallar değişkendir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Dichte der geförderten Flüssigkeit. Wasser: 1000 kg/m³, Öl: ~900 kg/m³, Chemikalien variieren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse volumique du fluide pompé. Eau : 1000 kg/m³, huile : ~900 kg/m³, produits chimiques variables.
businessContext_i18n.es: Densidad del fluido bombeado. Agua: 1000 kg/m³, petróleo: ~900 kg/m³, productos químicos varían.

inputs.label: Pump Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Efficiency of the pump, typically 0.6-0.85 for centrifugal pumps.

businessContext_i18n.en: Efficiency of the pump, typically 0.6-0.85 for centrifugal pumps.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pompa verimliliği, santrifüj pompalar için tipik olarak 0.6-0.85.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wirkungsgrad der Pumpe, typischerweise 0,6-0,85 für Kreiselpumpen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement de la pompe, typiquement 0,6-0,85 pour les pompes centrifuges.
businessContext_i18n.es: Eficiencia de la bomba, típicamente 0.6-0.85 para bombas centrífugas.

inputs.label: Motor Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Efficiency of the electric motor driving the pump. Typical IE3 motor: 0.93-0.96.

businessContext_i18n.en: Efficiency of the electric motor driving the pump. Typical IE3 motor: 0.93-0.96.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pompayı çalıştıran elektrik motorunun verimliliği. Tipik IE3 motor: 0.93-0.96.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wirkungsgrad des Elektromotors, der die Pumpe antreibt. Typischer IE3-Motor: 0,93-0,96.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement du moteur électrique entraînant la pompe. Moteur IE3 typique : 0,93-0,96.
businessContext_i18n.es: Eficiencia del motor eléctrico que impulsa la bomba. Motor IE3 típico: 0.93-0.96.

inputs.label: Safety Factor
inputs.businessContext: Safety margin to account for uncertainties (e.g., 1.1 = 10% extra). Common range 1.1-1.2.

businessContext_i18n.en: Safety margin to account for uncertainties (e.g., 1.1 = 10% extra). Common range 1.1-1.2.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Belirsizlikleri hesaba katmak için güvenlik marjı (ör. 1.1 = %10 ekstra). Yaygın aralık 1.1-1.2.
businessContext_i18n.de: Sicherheitszuschlag zur Berücksichtigung von Unsicherheiten (z. B. 1,1 = 10 % Aufschlag). Üblicher Bereich 1,1-1,2.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Marge de sécurité pour tenir compte des incertitudes (ex. 1,1 = 10% supplémentaire). Plage courante 1,1-1,2.
businessContext_i18n.es: Margen de seguridad para tener en cuenta incertidumbres (ej. 1.1 = 10% extra). Rango común 1.1-1.2.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
